items.content_text: I bought surprisingly little from Corsair since 2018. It’s been G.Skill RAM more recently, mostly because of color options and pricing.  [www.tomshardware.com/pc-compon...](https://www.tomshardware.com/pc-components/ram/corsair-lost-a-lawsuit-over-advertising-overclocked-memory-speeds-and-you-could-get-paid-the-settlement-covers-u-s-purchases-between-2018-and-2025)

items.title: Sidemount external filament mount
items.content_html:
Printed a side-mount external reel holder for the 3D printer. Saves me from awkwardly having to reach behind to mount an external reel, and also switching the PTFE feed tube.

This one works great with reels big and small, including the color samplers that I love!

As most folks with 3D printers know : easily half your prints are going to be some accessory for your hobby.

This model I found happens to include the Bambu logo, so I tried to do a color match.

This one works great with reels big and small, including the color samplers that I love! As most folks with 3D printers know : easily half your prints are going to be some accessory for your hobby. This model I found happens to include the Bambu logo, so I tried to do a color match.
